content:
liquid-glass adds a headless liquid glass layer to React interfaces.

• Refract wrapped DOM content with SVG filters.

• Build copied glass panels for Safari and Firefox.

• Add multiple lenses over video or canvas surfaces.

• Tune blur, curvature, glow, highlights, and chromatic edges through optics.

👉 GitHub Repo

👉 Live Demo
